title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.470 - No property exemption for personal services, by whom — provisions
text:
513.470.  No property exemption for personal services, by whom — provisions. — For all personal services rendered by any person acting in the capacity of house servant or common laborer, to an amount not exceeding ninety dollars, no property shall be exempt from seizure and sale under execution; if suit is instituted to recover the same within the time allowed in section 513.060.
(RSMo 1939 § 1331, A.L. 1959 S.B. 238) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1167; 1919 § 1618; 1909 § 2187
